## Pull Request Type

Please select the type of change:

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (change that may break existing functionality)
- [ ] Maintenance / refactor / housekeeping

---

## Description of Changes

Please describe the change in detail and the motivation behind it.

Include context, architectural impact (if any), and affected modules.

---

## How Has This Been Tested?

Describe the tests performed to validate the change.

Include:

- Test environment configuration
- Steps to reproduce
- Expected vs actual results
- Any relevant edge cases considered

### Test Execution

- [ ] Full test suite executed successfully
- [ ] Unit tests added or updated
- [ ] Integration tests executed (if applicable)
- [ ] Manual testing performed (if applicable)

---

## Security & Privacy Review

Confirm the following:

- [ ] No secrets, signing keys, or production credentials are committed
- [ ] No sensitive test data is included in the repository
- [ ] No unintended exposure of personal or credential data
- [ ] No insecure demo endpoints or test trust anchors used in production paths
- [ ] Security impact of the change has been evaluated

---

## Code Quality Checklist

- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Code is commented where logic is non-trivial
- [ ] No new compiler or linter warnings introduced
- [ ] Readme updated if required
- [ ] Documentation updated where applicable

---

## Testing Validation

- [ ] Unit tests added for new functionality or fixes
- [ ] Existing tests pass locally
- [ ] UI views verified for accessibility compliance (if applicable)
- [ ] Strings localized where applicable

---

## Release Considerations

- [ ] Change has been verified in release/build configuration
- [ ] No breaking impact on backward compatibility
- [ ] Dependencies updated and reviewed (if applicable)
